# Supa
> Postgres-backed backend platform

Supa is the open-source Firebase alternative, providing a Postgres database,
authentication, realtime subscriptions, and edge functions.

## Docs
- [Getting Started](https://supa.example/docs/getting-started): quick on-ramp
- [Reference](https://supa.example/docs/reference)
- plain text note, skip me

## Examples
- [Basic example](https://supa.example/examples/basic)

## Optional
- [Advanced tuning](https://supa.example/advanced)
- [Internal migration notes](https://supa.example/migration)
